title: DTQEM: Unified Framework for Open Quantum Systems
description: This framework simulates open quantum systems (Lindblad equation) under the Time-Sovereignty hypothesis. It includes numerical validations for the Davisson-Germer experiment, quantum tunneling (Zeno effect), and the resonance collapse model (V = D).
